chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Revision Application No.D-36 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 25.07.2024 Mr. Muhammad Jamil Ahmed, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. == The applicant assails order dated 26.09.2023 rendered by the Court of 1st Additional Sessions Judge / Special Judge CNS, Hyderabad in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.Nil of 2023 whereby an application under section 517-A Cr.P.C to restore the Truck taken into possession in a Narcotic matter was dismissed. The impugned order inter alia demonstrates that the applicant failed to demonstrate title to the vehicle. Even now learned counsel admits the absence of any registered title to the said vehicle and upon query of the Court it is admitted that even in 342 Cr.P.C statement no claim in respect of the said vehicle was made. It is also observed that no appeal against the judgment wherein the Truck was forfeited was ever filed. Learned counsel remained unable to demonstrate any infirmity in the impugned order and it also could not be shown that the impugned order could not be rested on the rationale relied upon. In view hereof, this Criminal Revision Application is found to be devoid of merit hence dismissed. Judge Judge Muhammad Danish*
